title: plerandra osyana subsp. toto
intro: Plerandra osyana subsp. toto, also known as P. tototo, is a plant species native to the island of New Caledonia. It is a member of the Aristolochiaceae family and is traditionally used in herbal medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Plerandra osyana subsp. toto can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, although its preparations and health benefits require further research and validation.
